form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 9 at this track on March 13 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Marry The Night with 60kg at $15. Before that second last of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind I Am Me with 58kg at $17. Well placed to play a major role.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation by neck this track January 22 over 1400m defeating Six Of Diamonds carrying 61kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Wolverhampton October 14 2024 over 1200m, 6 len behind Pals Battalion carrying 59kg at $11. Very keen on his prospects while fresh.
